title: RSW Christmas 21 Piece Ribbon & Bow Set – 18 Gold & Silver Foil Bows with 3 x 7m Foil Ribbons – Luxury Festive Gift Wrapping Pack
features: COMPLETE GIFT WRAP SET – Includes 18 gold and silver foil bows and 3 rolls of matching foil ribbon (7m each)
ELEGANT METALLIC FINISH – Adds a luxury and festive shine to Christmas gifts and hampers
TIME-SAVING SOLUTION – Pre-made bows and ready-to-use ribbons make wrapping quick and easy
VERSATILE USE – Perfect for gift wrapping, decorating, and holiday crafting projects
STANDOUT PRESENTATION – Create coordinated, professional-looking packages with minimal effort
description: Make your Christmas gifts sparkle with the RSW 21 Piece Gold & Silver Foil Ribbon & Bow Set. This elegant set includes eighteen pre-made bows in a mix of shimmering gold and silver, plus three matching rolls of foil ribbon measuring approximately 7 metres each. Designed to add a sophisticated finish to your festive wrapping, this set is perfect for anyone who loves to make their presents stand out under the Christmas tree. The metallic foil design reflects light beautifully, adding instant glamour and a touch of luxury to your gift presentation. The pre-made bows make wrapping effortless, while the generous ribbon length provides plenty of material for curling, tying, and decorating. Ideal for Christmas gifts, hampers, and DIY crafts, this coordinated ribbon and bow set allows you to create professional-looking packages with minimal effort. A must-have for those who want to add an elegant finishing touch to their festive season celebrations.
